hard_card_1.description: No formal risk assessment is provided for this high-risk AI system (credit scoring). EU AI Act Article 9 requires a risk management system for high-risk AI.
hard_card_1.suggested_fix: Include a comprehensive risk assessment covering identified risks, risk mitigation measures, and residual risk analysis.

hard_card_1.description: The system makes 'final autonomous decisions without human intervention'. For credit scoring (high-risk), EU AI Act Article 14 requires human oversight measures.
hard_card_1.suggested_fix: Document human oversight procedures including human-in-the-loop mechanisms, appeal processes, and override capabilities.

hard_card_1.description: Training data described as 'proprietary bank data' with no provenance details, data governance documentation, or quality assurance measures. EU AI Act Article 10 requires documented data governance.
hard_card_1.suggested_fix: Document data provenance, collection methodology, quality checks, representativeness analysis, and data governance procedures.

hard_card_1.description: No transparency disclosures for end users. Loan applicants should be informed that an AI system is used in the decision process. NIST AI RMF Govern function requires transparency.
hard_card_1.regulation: EU AI Act Article 13, NIST AI RMF Govern 1.2
hard_card_1.suggested_fix: Add a transparency section documenting how end-users will be informed about AI involvement in the decision.

hard_card_2.description: No formal risk assessment provided for this high-risk AI system (employment/hiring). EU AI Act Annex III classifies employment AI as high-risk.
hard_card_2.regulation: EU AI Act Article 9, Annex III(4)
hard_card_2.suggested_fix: Conduct and document a full risk assessment per Article 9, including risk identification, evaluation, and mitigation measures.

hard_card_2.description: System 'automatically filters out candidates scoring below 40 without human review'. This violates Article 14 human oversight requirements for high-risk AI.
hard_card_2.suggested_fix: Implement and document human review process for all automated filtering decisions. Add appeal mechanism.

hard_card_2.description: Bias analysis only covers gender (binary) and explicitly states age and ethnicity were not analyzed, which are protected characteristics under employment law.
hard_card_2.suggested_fix: Conduct comprehensive bias analysis including age, ethnicity, disability status, and intersectional analysis using proxy variables if direct attributes unavailable.

hard_card_2.description: Historical hiring data may encode historical biases. No documentation of bias mitigation in training data. Only US tech sector data — geographic and industry bias not addressed.
hard_card_2.suggested_fix: Document bias analysis of training data, representativeness assessment, and any debiasing techniques applied.

hard_card_2.description: No transparency disclosures documented. Job applicants must be informed about AI involvement in hiring decisions.
hard_card_2.regulation: EU AI Act Article 13, NIST AI RMF Govern 1.2
hard_card_2.suggested_fix: Document how candidates will be informed about AI usage in the screening process and their right to contest decisions.

hard_card_3.description: No formal risk assessment for a medical AI system. EU AI Act Annex III classifies medical device AI as high-risk. NIST AI RMF Map function requires risk identification.
hard_card_3.regulation: EU AI Act Article 9, Annex III(5), NIST AI RMF Map 1.1
hard_card_3.suggested_fix: Document comprehensive risk assessment including clinical risks, failure modes, and patient safety implications.

hard_card_3.description: System auto-flags cases as positive in PACS at confidence > 0.95 without documented human oversight. Medical AI requires robust human-in-the-loop mechanisms.
hard_card_3.suggested_fix: Document how radiologists review and confirm AI-flagged cases before clinical action. Add override capabilities.

hard_card_3.description: No racial/ethnic subgroup analysis performed. Medical AI has documented disparities across racial groups in diagnostic imaging. Gender analysis was also omitted.
hard_card_3.regulation: EU AI Act Article 10(2)(f), NIST AI RMF Measure 2.6
hard_card_3.suggested_fix: Conduct full demographic subgroup analysis including race, ethnicity, and gender with disaggregated performance metrics.

hard_card_3.description: Labels derived from NLP pipeline whose accuracy 'was not reported'. This creates unknown data quality issues. Data only from US academic centers — generalizability not addressed.
hard_card_3.regulation: EU AI Act Article 10, NIST AI RMF Measure 2.5
hard_card_3.suggested_fix: Report NLP label extraction accuracy, conduct label quality audit, and document geographic/demographic representativeness of training sites.

hard_card_3.description: Performance metrics only reported for pneumonia detection. TB and nodule detection performance 'not separately reported' despite being listed capabilities.
hard_card_3.regulation: EU AI Act Article 11, NIST AI RMF Measure 2.3
hard_card_3.suggested_fix: Report full disaggregated performance metrics for all claimed detection capabilities.
